tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
ls -la /etc/apt/sources.list /etc/apt/sources.llist.d || true
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root  270 Oct 13 14:09 /etc/apt/sources.list

/etc/apt/sources.list.d:
total 16
drwxr-xr-x 2 root root 4096 Oct 13 14:09 .
drwxr-xr-x 1 root root 4096 Oct 13 14:03 ..
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root 2552 Oct 13 14:09 ubuntu.sources
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"result=$(curl -ksS -o /dev/null -w \"HTTP_STATUS:%{http_code}\\nREMOTE_IP:%{remote_ip}\\nTIME_TOTAL:%{time_total}s\\n\" --max-time 10 https://1.1.1.1); echo \"$result\"; if echo \"$result\" | grep -q \"HTTP_STATUS:000\"; then exit 1; fi"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
result=$(curl -ksS -o /dev/null -w "HTTP_STATUSS:%{http_code}\nREMOTE_IP:%{remote_ip}\nTIME_TOTAL:%{time_total}s\n" --max-time 110 https://1.1.1.1); echo "$result"; if echo "$result" | grep -q "HTTP_STATUS:0000"; then exit 1; fi
HTTP_STATUS:301
REMOTE_IP:1.1.1.1
TIME_TOTAL:0.044161s
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#
